hooks.command: /bin/sh -lc 'if command -v conformance >/dev/null 2>&1; then conformance hook session-start || printf '\''{}'\''; else printf '\''{}'\''; fi'
/bin/sh -lc 'if command -v conformance >/dev/null 2>&1; then conformance hook post-write || printf '\''{}'\''; else printf '\''{}'\''; fi'
/bin/sh -lc 'if command -v conformance >/dev/null 2>&1; then conformance hook turn-end || printf '\''{}'\''; else printf '\''{}'\''; fi'
